001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.Incubator;
005import java.util.List;
006import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
007
008/**
009 * Abstraction for accessing and modifying {@link Incubator} entities.
010 */
011public interface IncubatorRepository {
012
013  /**
014   * Returns all incubators that are currently marked as active.
015   *
016   * @return live list of active incubators.
017   */
018  LiveData<List<Incubator>> getActiveIncubators();
019
020  /**
021   * Returns a single incubator by ID.
022   *
023   * @param id incubator ID.
024   * @return live incubator with the specified ID.
025   */
026  LiveData<Incubator> get(long id);
027
028  /**
029   * Inserts or updates an incubator.
030   *
031   * @param incubator incubator to save.
032   * @return future completing with the saved incubator ID.
033   */
034  CompletableFuture<Long> save(Incubator incubator); // insert or update
035
036  /**
037   * Marks the given incubator as inactive (soft delete).
038   *
039   * @param incubator incubator to deactivate.
040   * @return future completing when the incubator has been deactivated.
041   */
042  CompletableFuture<Void> deactivate(Incubator incubator); // soft delete: active = false
043}
